untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit price ratio calculation and cointegration testing (ADF test, hedge ratio estimation) which are not available in the indicator set. The core concept of 'ratio-based spread stationarity vs pairs lacking true cointegration' cannot be operationalized with standard technical indicators. A proper implementation requires statistical cointegration analysis and dynamic hedge ratio computation, neither of which are supported.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using log_returns as a proxy for ratio-based mean reversion, but this does not capture the fundamental requirement: detecting non-cointegrated pairs where ratio-based spreads remain stationary while traditional spreads do not. This requires advanced econometric analysis outside the scope of the allowed indicator set.
